arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich won’t spring for new goalkeeper this winter
arts.sum: Despite Daniel Peretz’s kidney injury and the recurrent problems around Manuel Neuer and Sven Ulreich, Bayern are currently planning to go into the second half of the season with the same set of goalkeepers and hoping there will be no new injuries. Bayern Munich may have been bit by the injury bug at the goalkeeper position again — but don’t expect any moves in the January transfer window .

arts.ttl: Leroy Sané is the least likely to extend with Bayern Munich, but a deal until 2028 is still on the cards
arts.sum: Bayern Munich has made it clear to Leroy Sané that unless he picks up the slack, he’s out of a job in the summer. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 26: Should Bayern Munich give in to Jamal Musiala’s release clause demand?; What is a fair offer to Thomas Müller and Leroy Sané?; Bayern still scouting Viktor Gyökeres?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Discussing the latest contract updates for Thomas Müller, Leroy Sané, and Joshua Kimmich. Let’s talk about everything going on, including the big debate — to add a release or not add a release clause to a new contract for Jamal Musiala This is what we have on tap for this episode of the Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show:

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies’ new contract terms with Bayern Munich revealed
arts.sum: Bayern Munich fans can get a breather now because Alphonso Davies, at one point on the brink of a transfer to Real Madrid, is reportedly closing in on a renewal in Bavaria and is re-negotiating with the club to iron out the financial aspect of his contract. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich ramping up efforts to sign Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyökeres
arts.sum: Surprisingly enough, so is the striker position by targeting red-hot Swedish superstar Viktor Gyökeres, and they want him bad: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.
